schema_descriptions.aml: AML alerts, cases, case links, typology outputs, and investigation workflow records.
schema_descriptions.governance: Audit events, model runs, validation reports, lineage, and reproducibility artefacts.
schema_descriptions.mart: Feature tables and analytics-ready outputs for rules, graph features, and models.
schema_descriptions.raw: Unmodified source data loaded from synthetic or external AML datasets.
schema_descriptions.staging: Cleaned, standardised, and relationally consistent operational tables.
